title: AI Renaissance Oil
description: Transforms the photo into a classic Renaissance oil painting on canvas.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a Renaissance-inspired oil painting. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identities, key facial features, pose, camera angle, framing, and main composition. Use deep rich colors, fine sfumato blending, classic painterly brushstrokes, visible canvas texture, period portrait composition, and dramatic chiaroscuro lighting with soft shadow transitions.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, photographic look, camera flash, modern clothing, digital artifacts, bad anatomy, malformed hands, distorted faces, low quality, blurry, low resolution
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. chiaroscuro lighting, dark moody background...
